title: Cube's Craft
description: A resource pack that changes many of the game's visuals in a way that is true to vanilla, while still being unique.
body:
![Cube's Craft Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5dcdec107484fa0bb04517a4db3617ab4b1d675e.png)

Cube's Craft is a resourcepack (with some optional supplemental datapacks) that aims to expand on vanilla Minecraft using only a resource pack (and the datapacks if you want them) WITHOUT requiring OptiFine/any other mods. It overhauls the game by redesigning many blocks, items, mobs, and the GUI!

This pack is the culmination of nearly 2 years of work, done entirely by myself. Because of this, I haven't gotten much feedback on the project yet, so please feel free to leave feedback!

Some of the textures (sand, sandstone red sand, red sandstone, and obsidian) are taken/modified from old versions of the texture update, so credit goes to Jappa for those.

Feel free to join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/T7NP4WX2nA)!

Check out the expansions [here](https://modrinth.com/collection/4yhJ4w2t)
